title: geranium harveyi
intro: Geranium harveyi, also known as the 'Rose Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Geranium harveyi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of Geranium harveyi include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a dietary supplement.
